title: Pocket Monster
bio: Norb Buttonsnack is a pocket monster who lives in coat pockets and guards lost lint. He feels suspicious, chews on buttons, and keeps a tiny map to the laundry basket.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a small rounded bean body. Add two stubby legs and two short arm blobs.
steps.hint: A bean shape makes Norb easy to pose and very pocket-sized.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw two uneven oval eyes. Add one high eyebrow, one low eyebrow, and a tiny toothy mouth.
steps.hint: Uneven eyes make the monster look curious and a little weird.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add tiny horns, belly spots, a button snack, lint dots, and a small folded map shape.
steps.hint: The map can be a little rectangle with one wavy line.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the body, arms, legs, face, horns, spots, button, lint, and map with clear simple lines.
steps.hint: Keep the teeth tiny so the monster stays friendly.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the body, horns, spots, button, and map. Add soft shadow under the little feet.
steps.hint: A few darker belly spots give Norb personality without making the drawing busy.
